name: stereoframe-runtime
description: Declarative, deterministic 3D scene runtime for stereoframe — three.js driven by seek time.

scripts.build: bun build src/index.ts --outfile dist/stereoframe.js --format esm --minify --target browser && bun build src/vocab.ts --outfile dist/vocab.js --format esm --target node && bunx tsc src/vocab.ts --declaration --emitDeclarationOnly --outDir dist --module esnext --moduleResolution bundler --target es2022 --skipLibCheck
scripts.build:dev: bun build src/index.ts --outfile dist/stereoframe.js --format esm --target browser
